description:
Product Features


1. Support wireless Bluetooth audio transmission, support A2DP, AVRCP, GAVDP, IOPT, OPP, SSP and other protocols, Bluetooth V4.2 version;

2. Support Bluetooth TWS function, can be used independently, or paired into wireless pair box;

3. Comes with a suction cup, which can form a stereo sound for the main and auxiliary machines;

4. Unique built-in dual-radiation basin acoustic structure design, low frequency;

5. Unique transparent cavity structure design;

parameter

1. Rated power: 3W Impedance: 4 ohms

2. Drive unit: 4 ohms 3W

3. Signal to noise ratio: >=80dB

4. Distortion: THD+N<=0.5% (@Fo=1kHz, PO=1W)

5. Frequency range: 110Hz-20kHz

6. Bluetooth version: V5.0

7. Wireless working frequency range: 2.402~2.480MHZ

8. Effective distance: 10M

12.5V 1A input; battery charging for 3 hours

13. Battery life 5 hours (normal play status)

14. Appearance size: Φ65x80mm


Packing list:
1X data cable
1X audio cable
1X transparent speaker
